hero_description: The world has changed, so has education. Ágora prepares you with the technical and human skills that cutting-edge schools demand today. Get certified and lead the classroom of the future.
kernel_description: We level the ground with the universal fundamentals of teaching, updated for the digital age and Education 5.0.
kernel_2_description: How the brain learns in the digital age.
kernel_3_description: PBL, Flipped Classroom and Design Thinking.
ia_description: Forget static CVs. Ágora builds your Neuronal Curriculum Map in real time. Our AI analyzes your performance, detects gaps in your Power Skills and suggests the exact training path you need to evolve.
galaxies_description: It's not enough to know how to teach; the 5.0 teacher masters multiple dimensions. We have structured our offer into 5 Galaxies that respond to the critical challenges of today's education.
galaxy_1_challenge: Diverse classrooms with students who have unique learning rhythms and neurological needs (ADHD, high abilities).
galaxy_1_objective: Master neurodidactics to design inclusive and emotionally intelligent learning experiences.
galaxy_2_challenge: Educational institutions that require sustainable business models, legal compliance and agile leadership.
galaxy_2_objective: Train directors capable of managing innovative schools, understanding legal frameworks (RVOE) and leading teams.
galaxy_3_objective: Become an expert in EdTech and AI, using digital tools to personalize and enhance learning.
galaxy_3_challenge: Digital obsolescence and the emergence of Artificial Intelligence that transforms how we teach and evaluate.
galaxy_4_challenge: Traditional shoebox classrooms that limit creativity, movement and collaboration.
galaxy_4_objective: Apply Neuroarchitecture principles to transform any physical or virtual space into a third teacher.
society_challenge_text: The crisis of values, misinformation and social disconnection in a hyperconnected world.
society_objective_text: Train global citizens with digital ethics, critical thinking and commitment to sustainability (SDG).
cert_description: At Ágora, every skill counts. Obtain certifications with unfalsifiable blockchain technology and digital Badges compatible with LinkedIn and smart CVs.
blockchain_description: Your diplomas are secured on the blockchain. Total portability, instant verification and bank-grade security.
badges_description: Officially recognized labor competency standards. Collect digital badges for each mastered micro-skill.
next_description: Learning doesn't end in the classroom. Discover the space designed for family transformation, where parents and guardians acquire tools for parenting in the digital age.
